pubmed.query: (("rheumatoid arthritis"[Title] OR "Arthritis, Rheumatoid"[Majr]) OR ("systemic lupus erythematosus"[Title] OR "lupus nephritis"[Title] OR "Lupus Erythematosus, Systemic"[Majr] OR "Lupus Nephritis"[Majr]) OR ("Sjögren syndrome"[Title] OR "Sjogren syndrome"[Title] OR "Sjögren disease"[Title] OR "Sjogren's Syndrome"[Majr]) OR ("systemic sclerosis"[Title] OR "systemic scleroderma"[Title] OR "Scleroderma, Systemic"[Majr]) OR ("idiopathic inflammatory myopathy"[Title] OR dermatomyositis[Title] OR polymyositis[Title] OR "immune-mediated necrotizing myopathy"[Title] OR "antisynthetase syndrome"[Title] OR "Dermatomyositis"[Majr] OR "Polymyositis"[Majr]) OR (spondyloarthritis[Title] OR "axial spondyloarthritis"[Title] OR "ankylosing spondylitis"[Title] OR "psoriatic arthritis"[Title] OR "Spondylarthritis"[Majr] OR "Spondylitis, Ankylosing"[Majr] OR "Arthritis, Psoriatic"[Majr]) OR ("ANCA-associated vasculitis"[Title] OR "giant cell arteritis"[Title] OR "Takayasu arteritis"[Title] OR "Behcet disease"[Title] OR "Behçet disease"[Title] OR "granulomatosis with polyangiitis"[Title] OR "microscopic polyangiitis"[Title] OR "eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis"[Title] OR "Systemic Vasculitis"[Majr] OR "Giant Cell Arteritis"[Majr] OR "Takayasu Arteritis"[Majr] OR "Behcet Syndrome"[Majr]) OR ("antiphospholipid syndrome"[Title] OR "Antiphospholipid Syndrome"[Majr]) OR ("IgG4-related disease"[Title] OR "Immunoglobulin G4-Related Disease"[Majr]) OR ("adult-onset Still disease"[Title] OR "familial Mediterranean fever"[Title] OR "cryopyrin-associated periodic syndrome"[Title] OR "Familial Mediterranean Fever"[Majr]) OR (gout[Title] OR "calcium pyrophosphate deposition"[Title] OR "Gout"[Majr] OR "Chondrocalcinosis"[Majr]) OR ("juvenile idiopathic arthritis"[Title] OR "juvenile systemic lupus"[Title] OR "juvenile dermatomyositis"[Title] OR "Arthritis, Juvenile"[Majr])) NOT "lupus vulgaris"[Title]
